# DS Crédito Setúbal Vitória

> Independent credit brokerage in Setúbal, Portugal. Part of Decisões e Soluções, Portugal's largest credit intermediary group.

## Company Overview

DS Crédito Setúbal Vitória is an independent credit brokerage (intermediário de crédito vinculado) located in Setúbal, Portugal. We are part of the Decisões e Soluções group, which has over 22 years of experience, 1,400+ team members, and 170+ offices across Portugal.

We specialize in mortgage advisory and credit brokerage for both Portuguese residents and international property buyers. Our service is completely free for the buyer — we are compensated by lending institutions.

## Services

- Financial Viability Pre-Check: Assessment of purchasing capacity before property search
- Bank Offer Comparison: Simulation and comparison across multiple partner banks
- Documentation Management: Complete paperwork handling, including remote support for international clients
- Bank Negotiation: Expert negotiation for optimal credit conditions
- Full Approval Support: End-to-end assistance from pre-approval through deed signing
- International Client Support: English-language service, remote document handling, coordination with lawyers and notaries

## Location and Contact

- Address: Avenida Bento Gonçalves nº 2, 2910-431 Setúbal, Portugal
- Email: infosuporteds@gmail.com
- Phone: +351 265 117 174
- Website: https://meuintermediario.com

## Opening Hours

- Monday to Friday: 09:00 - 18:00
- Saturday: 10:00 - 13:00
- Sunday: Closed

## Target Audience

1. International property buyers seeking financing in Portugal
2. Real estate agents and agencies working with international clients
3. Relocation specialists assisting clients moving to Portugal
4. Property developers needing financing solutions for their buyers
5. Portuguese real estate companies looking for a credit brokerage partner

## Process

1. Initial Contact — Feasibility call scheduled within 24-48 hours
2. Review & Scenarios — Profile assessment and multi-bank offer comparison
3. Pre-Approval — Direct submission and liaison with banks
4. Formalisation — Document management and coordination with all parties
5. Completion — Deed signing support and post-completion assistance

## Parent Organization

Decisões e Soluções (DS Group)
- Largest credit intermediary group in Portugal
- 22+ years of experience
- 170+ stores nationwide
- 1,400+ team members
- Historic growth year in 2025

## Regulatory Information

- Legal Name: Letraperfeiçoada - Unipessoal Lda
- Banco de Portugal Registration: Nº 0007470
- Category: Intermediário de Crédito Vinculado (Tied Credit Intermediary)
- Exclusivity: No (works with multiple banks)
- Credit Types: Housing credit (crédito à habitação), Consumer credit (crédito aos consumidores)
- Consultancy Services: Yes
- Registry: https://www.bportugal.pt/intermediariocreditofar/letraperfeicoada-unipessoal-lda

### Partner Banks
- Caixa Geral de Depósitos
- Banco Santander Totta
- Novo Banco
- Banco BPI
- Bankinter
- Banco CTT
- ABANCA Portugal
- BNI Europa
- UCI (Union de Créditos Inmobiliários)
- Unicre

## Languages

Services available in Portuguese and English.
